sourcesContent:
import { AppBar, Box, Dialog, DialogTitle, Toolbar } from '@material-ui/core'
import { CloseRounded } from '@material-ui/icons'
import React from 'react'

function CreateActivity() {
  return (
    <Box>
        <Dialog open={true} fullScreen>
            <DialogTitle>
                <AppBar>
                    <Toolbar>
                        <CloseRounded />
                    </Toolbar>
                </AppBar>
            </DialogTitle>
        </Dialog>
    </Box>
  )
}

export default CreateActivity
